# Web Subsystem

Contains: 3 files, 2 models, 2 components.

## Key Files
- `web/src/App.tsx` (models, UI)
- `web/src/auth/Login.tsx` (models, UI)
- `web/src/config.ts` (high relevance)

## Models
- `AppProps` (title)
- `LoginProps` (onSuccess)

## Components
- `App` (props: title)
- `Login` (props: onSuccess)

## Config
- `API_BASE_URL` (env)
- `AUTH_SECRET` (env)

## Also Inspect
If you change this area, also inspect:
- `api/auth.py`
